Pineapple Chicken Biryani

A layered chicken biryani featuring fried chicken, aromatic rice, herbs, and a distinctive pineapple note for a sweet-sour finish.

Spice Level: 4/5
Sweet Level: 1/5

Prep Time: 1 h 15 m (from source)
Cook Time: 1 h 15 m (from source)
Servings: 8 to 10 [estimated]

Ingredients

Chicken Marinade
1 kg chicken pieces
2 tbsp yogurt
1 tsp chilli powder
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
1 tsp garam masala
1 tsp salt
1 egg

Rice
1 kg basmati rice
8 cups water
4 cardamom pods
4 cloves
2 inch cinnamon
1 tsp salt
1/2 tsp ghee

Masala
3 onions sliced
3 tomatoes chopped
2 tbsp ginger garlic paste
2 tsp coriander powder
1 tsp cumin powder
2 tsp red chilli powder
1/2 tsp turmeric powder
2 tbsp oil
2 tbsp ghee

Fried Garnish
handful cashew nuts
10 raisins
3 onions sliced for frying
2 tbsp oil

Layering and Finishing
2 tbsp ghee
1 cup pineapple pieces finely chopped
2 drops pineapple essence
1 pinch yellow food colour
1/4 cup coriander leaves chopped
1/4 cup mint leaves chopped
1 tsp lemon juice

Optional for Serving
fried onions
mint leaves
raita

Method

Marinating the Chicken
1. Mix all marinade ingredients with chicken in a bowl.
2. Rest covered for at least 1 hour.

Preparing the Rice
3. Wash basmati rice until water runs clear.
4. Boil water with whole spices and salt.
5. Add rice and cook until 75 percent done. Drain.

Frying the Garnish
6. Fry cashews and raisins in ghee until golden. Set aside.
7. Fry sliced onions until crisp and golden. Set aside.

Cooking the Masala
8. Heat oil and ghee in a heavy pan.
9. Saute onions until golden, then add ginger garlic paste.
10. Add tomatoes and dry spices. Cook until oil separates.
11. Add marinated chicken and cook until three-quarters done.

Layering and Dum Cooking
12. In a heavy pot, spread a layer of rice.
13. Add a layer of chicken masala, fried onions, herbs, and pineapple.
14. Repeat layers and finish with rice on top.
15. Drizzle ghee, lemon juice, and saffron milk if using.
16. Seal the pot and cook on very low heat for 25 to 30 minutes.
17. Rest 10 minutes before opening. Gently fluff and serve.

Tips
Use fresh pineapple for the best sweet-sour balance.
Layer rice and chicken gently to keep grains intact.
Serve hot with raita and pickled onions on the side.

Clarity Check
This may be a typo and could possibly mean 350°F. Please confirm oven temperature with the source.
Confirm Servings: 8 to 10 [estimated].
Was pineapple essence intended instead of only fresh pineapple?
